debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∀ (w : ℕ) (args : Vector (ZMod p) w) (e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)),
    ¬e.eval.val < 2 ^ w → ¬(Clap.assert_bits p inst✝ w args = true ∧ e = Exp.c (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args))

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
  intro w args e h hb
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    have he : e.eval = bits2num args := by
      simpa [bits2num] using congrArg Exp.eval hb.2
    simpa [he] using (bits2num p inst✝ w args).val_lt
  exact h this
